title: AI Homework Help: Use It Right
modules: AI as a Tutor, Not a Ghost Writer
The Credit Question: Who Did This?
synopsis: You're facing a deadline, a confusing assignment, and an AI tool that can write the whole thing in seconds — this story puts you in that moment and makes the consequences real. By playing through different choices, you'll develop your own honest, smart approach to using AI on schoolwork.
rationale: Students urgently need a practical ethical framework for AI-assisted schoolwork before schools and teachers define it entirely for them — literacy here means agency, not just compliance.
learning_outcome: Students can distinguish between AI uses that support their learning and those that replace it, and articulate a personal policy they could defend to a teacher or parent.
source_signals: The AI-Education Death Spiral a.k.a. Let the Kids Cheat
26% of students ages 13-17 are using ChatGPT to help with homework, study finds
His students suddenly started getting A's. Did a Google AI tool go too far? - CalMatters
His students suddenly started getting A's. Did a Google AI tool go too far? - Los Angeles Times
